2606.10835.title: Geometrically Averaged Hard Target Updates for Linear Q-Learning
2606.10835.paper_summary: Periodic hard target updates are among the most common stabilization devices in modern deep Q-learning. Recent studies suggest that target updates can improve stability in Q-learning with function approximation, including linear function approximation. We introduce and analyze the so-called $λ$-target update, obtained by averaging the $m$-periodic target update maps with $λ$-geometric weights $(1-λ)λ^{m-1}$, $λ\in [0,1]$. The endpoint $λ=0$ recovers the one-period target update, while the continuous endpoint $λ\uparrow1$ recovers projected Q-value iteration. We study this mechanism for Q-learning with linear function approximation, namely linear Q-learning, using a switching-system model and related tools. For clarity, the paper treats a deterministic version; the formulation extends to stochastic reinforcement-learning settings.
2606.10835.paper_summary_zh: 定期的硬目標更新是現代深度 Q 學習中最常見的穩定化裝置之一。最近的研究表明，目標更新可以改善具有函數逼近的 Q 學習的穩定性，包括線性函數逼近。我們引入並分析所謂的 $λ$-目標更新，這是通過將 $m$-周期目標更新映射與 $λ$-幾何權重 $(1-λ)λ^{m-1}$ 進行平均得到的，其中 $λ\in [0,1]$。端點 $λ=0$ 恢復了一周期目標更新，而連續端點 $λ\uparrow1$ 則恢復了投影 Q 值迭代。我們使用切換系統模型和相關工具研究這一機制在線性函數逼近的 Q 學習中的應用，即線性 Q 學習。為了清晰起見，本文處理了一個確定性版本；該公式擴展到隨機強化學習環境。
2606.10835.author: Donghwan Lee et.al.
